name: dbt-agent
description: Codex plugin for Embed Labs, the Codex-facing Development Board Toolchain integration backed by the shared macOS runtime and dbt-agentd.

interface.shortDescription: TaishanPi and RP2350-family board control for Codex
interface.longDescription: Embed Labs is the Codex-facing name for Development Board Toolchain. It exposes compact board-control, build, flash, and capability tools through the shared macOS runtime and local dbt-agentd, covering TaishanPi, ColorEasyPICO2, and Raspberry Pi Pico 2 W.
defaultPrompt: 读取 Pico 2 W 的最小构建配置
为泰山派获取芯片控制或构建约束
